info.title: Daily Stock Analysis API
info.description:
A-share/HK-share/US-share watchlist intelligent analysis system API

## Modules
- Stock analysis: trigger AI intelligent analysis
- History: query historical analysis reports
- Stock data: fetch market quotes

## Authentication
Optional admin authentication is supported: when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true, /api/v1/* requires a valid admin session Cookie except for login, status, health check and OpenAPI docs; when disabled, authentication is not enforced.

get.description: Returns API running status info
Used by load balancers or monitoring systems to check service status; even if the static Web frontend is built, it returns JSON instead of the SPA HTML fallback.
Used by load balancers or monitoring systems to check service status
Health check endpoint under the API v1 prefix, used by monitoring systems and clients to probe service status.

post.description: Start an AI intelligent analysis task, supporting single or batch analysis of multiple stocks

409.description: Stock is being analyzed, duplicate submission rejected

get.description: Get all current analysis tasks, supporting filtering by status. Returns in-progress and recently completed tasks.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter status: pending, processing, completed, failed, cancel_requested, cancelled (comma-separated values supported)

get.description:
Push task status changes in real time via Server-Sent Events.

## Event types
- `connected`: connection established
- `task_created`: new task created
- `task_started`: task started
- `task_completed`: task completed
- `task_failed`: task failed
- `heartbeat`: heartbeat (every 30 seconds)
Paginated retrieval of historical analysis record summaries, supporting filtering by stock code, report type and date range

parameters.name: report_type
parameters.description: Report type filter (e.g. market_review); if omitted, returns all types of history.

get.description: Get the complete historical analysis report by query_id

parameters.name: query_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the analysis record

get.summary: Get news related to the historical report
get.description: Get the associated news intelligence list by query_id (returns 200 even if empty)

parameters.name: query_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the analysis record

get.description: Read the current system config and return categorized display values. Sensitive fields masked by the server may return mask_token; the client should judge based on raw_value_exists and is_masked.

parameters.name: include_schema
parameters.description: Whether to include field metadata (default true)

put.description: Update system config by key. If the field value is a mask (e.g. ******), the original value is kept and not overwritten.

get.description: Return the raw text content of the currently saved `.env`, used for config backup.

post.description: Merge the backup text into the current `.env` by key-level override, reusing the existing config version conflict protection.

400.description: Import file invalid or config validation failed

post.description: Only validate the submitted content without writing to .env. Used for pre-check before frontend save.

get.description: Return config categories, field types, validation rules and UI control suggestions, for frontend dynamic rendering.

post.description: Explicitly write a DecisionSignal. When horizon/expires_at are omitted, the service fills in default lifecycle; when hitting a same-source dedup key or narrow relaxed dedup, it returns the existing record with created=false; an active new creation or expired renewal invalidates the old active opposite signal of the same stock, and an active duplicate retry also reruns that fix; ordinary old duplicate/replay does not count as a new activation event; concurrent absolute idempotency is not guaranteed.

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

422.description: Request body or path parameter validation failed

get.description: Paginated query of DecisionSignal; active signals whose expires_at has passed are lazily expired before reading. When source_type=analysis and only source_report_id is passed for query, if no matching signal is hit, it attempts a one-time lazy backfill based on that historical report (only on the first list-hit scenario, and this exact query triggers historical decision signal backfill write, which is a read-with-write behavior; it does not affect other paginated list filter parameter scenarios). holding_only=true only reads the cached positions of active accounts' portfolio_positions and does not trigger portfolio snapshot replay.

parameters.name: holding_only

schema.description: Filter to active cached portfolio holdings only
schema.title: Holding Only

parameters.description: Filter to active cached portfolio holdings only

parameters.name: account_id

schema.description: Optional active portfolio account id for holding_only
schema.title: Account Id

parameters.description: Optional active portfolio account id for holding_only

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

get.summary: Query the latest active decision signal for a stock
get.description: Return the list of the latest active signals for the specified stock; lazy expiration is performed before reading.

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

422.description: Path or query parameter validation failed

get.description: Query a single DecisionSignal by ID; lazy expiration is performed before reading.

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

patch.description: Only update valid status and optional metadata; when metadata is provided, it is replaced as a whole package. Terminal statuses such as expired/invalidated/closed/archived cannot be PATCHed back to active.

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

422.description: Request body or path parameter validation failed

get.description: Query the run flow snapshot of an active task or a persisted task by task_id. When an active task lacks diagnostics, a skeleton flow is returned; for completed tasks, historical diagnostics can be attempted by the same task_id/query_id.

Get the historical report run flow snapshot by history record ID or a resolvable query_id. When old history lacks diagnostics, skeleton/unknown status is returned, without affecting report detail reading.

parameters.name: record_id
parameters.description: History record primary key ID or query_id

get.description: Aggregate token consumption by period, call type, and model.
Return token totals, model breakdowns, and recent LLM call records.

post.description: Explicitly trigger signal-level outcome computation; by default completed and terminal unable are skipped, but recoverable unable such as missing quote data are recomputed; force=true recomputes and overwrites the same signal_id+horizon+engine_version.

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

get.description: Paginated query of signal-level outcome; by default only the current signal posterior engine_version is queried.

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

get.description: By default statistics for the current engine_version, excluding archived signals.

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

get.summary: Query a single decision signal posterior result
get.description: Return the posterior result of the specified signal_id under the current engine_version.

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

get.description: Returns feedback_value=null when there is no feedback; returns 404 when the signal does not exist.

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

put.description: Upsert the latest useful/not_useful feedback by signal_id.

401.description: Not logged in or admin session invalid (when ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true)

422.description: Request body or path parameter validation failed

parameters.name: include_realtime

schema.description: Whether today's risk snapshot should try realtime quotes before historical close fallback
schema.title: Include Realtime

parameters.description: Whether today's risk snapshot should try realtime quotes before historical close fallback

message.example: Daily Stock Analysis API is running

stock_codes.description: Multiple stock codes (choose one with stock_code)

report_type.description: Report type: simple (concise) / detailed (full) / full (full) / brief (brief)

analysis_phase.description: Analysis stage override: auto (auto infer) / premarket (pre-market) / intraday (intraday) / postmarket (post-market)

query_id.description: Unique identifier of the analysis record

task_id.description: Task ID, used to query status
Task ID, used to query status

analysis_phase.description: Requested analysis stage; the history DB fallback without persisted fields may be empty

TaskInfo.description: Task details (used for task list and SSE events)

model_used.description: LLM model used for analysis (full name, e.g. gemini/gemini-2.0-flash)

SystemConfigItem.description: System config item (with masked display value)

value.description: Current config value; sensitive fields may return a mask, the real value is not guaranteed to be returned, the client should judge based on raw_value_exists and is_masked

raw_value_exists.description: Whether the original value of this key exists in the saved config; when false, value may come from defaults or runtime environment, and sensitive runtime values may still be masked by the server

is_masked.description: Whether value is a server-side masked display value

content.description: Raw text content of the currently saved `.env`

config_version.description: Config version corresponding to the export

value.description: New field value; if a mask token is passed for a sensitive field, it means keeping the original value

DecisionAction.description: Eight-state suggested actions, independent of the old decision_type=buy|hold|sell statistics caliber.

RunFlowNode.description: A node in the run flow

provider.description: Provider, model or notification channel name

attempts.description: Number of attempts represented by the node

RunFlowEdge.description: Directed edges in the run flow

fallback_count.description: Number of fallback or retry transitions

model.description: Masked model name observed in diagnostics

RunFlowSnapshot.description: Task or historical report run flow snapshot
